creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jakob Alvermark from comment #72)

> On a ThinkPad Yoga 12 (Broadwell) with ClickPad and TrackPoint.
> After r306355 the hardware buttons does not work anymore.
> ClickPad works, multifinger and all.

Is it Synaptics or Elan?

Could you add debug.psm.loglevel=5 to /boot/loader.conf and post here following parts of dmesg output (they can be found in /var/log/messages also):
1. PSM-related part of boot log. like described in post #25 in this thread.
2. Button press and release
